name: Honey Oatmeal Chewies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups quick cooking oats (not instant or old fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 25 minutes Bake Time: 11 to 14 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Crisco, granulated sugar, honey, egg, milk, and vanilla until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Stir in the oats, coconut, raisins, walnuts, and wheat germ (if using).
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 11 to 12 minutes for soft cookies or 13 to 14 minutes for crisp cookies. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
